question: The concept of 'business report structure'
options: It communicates complex information clearly and precisely to a specific audience
Title page, executive summary, table of contents, body, conclusions, recommendations, appendices
Define the scope, purpose and limitations of the investigation
Formal reports follow a structured format; informal reports are shorter and conversational
answer: Title page, executive summary, table of contents, body, conclusions, recommendations, appendices

question: An 'executive summary' should
options: Define the scope, purpose and limitations of the investigation
Concisely summarise the entire report's key findings and recommendations
Title page, executive summary, table of contents, body, conclusions, recommendations, appendices
Updates stakeholders on the status of an ongoing project
answer: Concisely summarise the entire report's key findings and recommendations

question: The concept of 'formal vs informal reports'
options: Using clear, simple language that readers can quickly understand
Formal reports follow a structured format; informal reports are shorter and conversational
Updates stakeholders on the status of an ongoing project
Uses charts, graphs and tables to communicate information clearly
answer: Formal reports follow a structured format; informal reports are shorter and conversational

question: A 'feasibility report' assesses
options: A document offering a solution to a problem or opportunity
Using clear, simple language that readers can quickly understand
Define the scope, purpose and limitations of the investigation
Whether a proposed project or plan is practical and worthwhile
answer: Whether a proposed project or plan is practical and worthwhile

question: The concept of 'progress report'
options: Updates stakeholders on the status of an ongoing project
Concisely summarise the entire report's key findings and recommendations
Using clear, simple language that readers can quickly understand
A document offering a solution to a problem or opportunity
answer: Updates stakeholders on the status of an ongoing project

question: An 'investigative report'
options: A document offering a solution to a problem or opportunity
Checking content, structure and accuracy before finalising a document
Attendance, apologies, matters discussed, decisions made and action points
Examines a problem or incident and recommends solutions
answer: Examines a problem or incident and recommends solutions

question: The concept of 'annual report'
options: Provides shareholders and stakeholders with a full account of organisational performance
Concisely summarise the entire report's key findings and recommendations
It communicates complex information clearly and precisely to a specific audience
Formal reports follow a structured format; informal reports are shorter and conversational
answer: Provides shareholders and stakeholders with a full account of organisational performance

options: Updates stakeholders on the status of an ongoing project
Checking content, structure and accuracy before finalising a document
It communicates complex information clearly and precisely to a specific audience
Attendance, apologies, matters discussed, decisions made and action points
answer: It communicates complex information clearly and precisely to a specific audience

options: Formal reports follow a structured format; informal reports are shorter and conversational

answer: Using clear, simple language that readers can quickly understand

options: Concise, precise and persuasive writing that respects the reader's time
Updates stakeholders on the status of an ongoing project
